ClinicalDocument.title: C-CDA R2.1 Patient Record: Berta524 Carmen818 Escobar593

section.title: Allergies
section.text: There are no current allergies at the time of this document's creation.

tr.td: Abnormal findings diagnostic imaging heart+coronary circulat (finding)
History of autologous bone marrow transplant (situation)
Reports of violence in the environment (finding)
